name: Mrs Fields' Chocolate Mint Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. In a medium bowl, combine flour, soda, salt, and cocoa. Mix well and set aside.
3. In a large bowl, blend sugars with an electric mixer on medium speed until combined.
4. Add butter and beat to form a grainy paste. Scrape sides of the bowl.
5. Add eggs and mint extract. Beat at medium speed until light and fluffy.
6. Gradually add the flour mixture and chocolate chips, blending at low speed just until combined.
7. Drop dough by rounded tablespoons onto ungreased cookie sheets, about 1 1/3 inches apart.
8. Bake for 19-21 minutes.
9. Immediately transfer cookies to a cool, flat surface.
